content:
Hello again, this is rain from Morimen discord. The last post i made was on the Goliath aequor story speedrun comp a while ago.

With the release of new unit mouchette and thais rerun(again), we now have a even faster speed run comp!

To start, why use mouch:

Shes is given for free to all players as part of the collab event (clear chapter 1, get from event page)

Her base damage is really REALLY high, which make her early game clear super duper fast

With some investment (E3,Lv60) , she can clear Dtide W1A5/W3A5 with cheap supports (helot, faint/lily etc, no thais needed)

shes just a fun unit in general


Update:  you can skip to the next part for the latest guide if you missed the thais lily banner, because it has rotated out, you can't pull them atm. I'm also using ramona over thais as an example for those that didn't manage to pull thais. REFER TO THE END OF THE THREAD FOR MY HARD MODE CLEAR OF CHAPTER 7.


----------------To Skip----------------

Unit break point and wheels:

The only 2 SSR wheel you need for this are Lily's Signature and Thais‘s signature.

Lily Signature(syringe looking wheel below) -> you use it because its a DR wheel (scaling from mouch E1) and because it gives free crit rate/crit damage on [strike] cards—— which all of mouch's offence cards are considered [strike].

Thais Signature(Goat/womb looking wheel below) -> Top 3 Wheel in game, no reason not to pull for it, just do it.

-----------------end of skip----------------

Now that lily wheel is not so available,  your best bet is either mouchette's signature or Blade of Titan. In general,  i would say use blade if you have it E3 or more dupes, it's gonna be more damage, other wise her own wheel at e0 is an ok options too.

For SR choice, you can use analysis of death / to dearest friend to boost her crit rate even more. I have used the combination of these two SR wheels in my hard mode clear at the end of thread.
thread_title: Beginner speedrun comp Ver2.0 ft. Mouch (and discord aurora)
